definition_population.content: PMF is a clonal MPN of HSC/progenitors with bone marrow fibrosis, driven by JAK2/CALR/MPL mutations activating JAK-STAT signaling; arises de novo or from prior PV/ET, typically in older adults.

epidemiology.content: Swedish registry: 1,079 MF patients vs 5,395 controls. Ontario registry: 1,385 MF cases among 10,336 total incident MPN cases (2004-2019).

sources.quote: In this nationwide population-based study, we assessed the frequency of major bleeding, thrombotic events, and all-cause mortality in 1079 patients diagnosed with MF and 5395 matched controls using multiple Swedish health care registers
all incident cases of MPN from the Ontario cancer registry between 2004 and 2019 (N=10,336; ET=5108; PV=3843; MF=1385)

biology.content: CALR is one of three canonical MPN driver mutations (JAK2/CALR/MPL); downstream mechanism converges on JAK-STAT pathway activation driving marrow fibrosis. Mechanism is myeloid/megakaryocyte-progenitor centered; no direct CD4+ T-cell literature link identified in this pass.

sources.quote: shar[e] a small set of canonical driver mutations in JAK2, CALR, or MPL
characterized by abnormal proliferation of hematopoiesis, associated with pathologically increased fibrosis in the bone marrow, which is primarily caused by activation of the JAK2 signaling pathway

treatment.content: Fedratinib (INREBIC), oral JAK2 inhibitor, FDA-approved for intermediate/high-risk MF (NDA212327, original approval 2019-08-16). Ruxolitinib also widely used.

sources.source_url: (no URL returned by tool; MCP drug-regulatory record: application_number=NDA212327, sponsor=BRISTOL-MYERS)
sources.quote: NDA212327, sponsor BRISTOL-MYERS, original approval action 2019-08-16

regulatory_trials.content: ClinicalTrials.gov lists 558 total interventional trials registered under 'primary myelofibrosis'.

sources.source_url: (no URL returned by tool; MCP clinical-trials search_trials result, condition="primary myelofibrosis", total=558)
sources.quote: total=558 (search_trials API, condition='primary myelofibrosis', study_type=INTERVENTIONAL, count_total=True)

gaps: Direct mechanistic step (mutant CALR activating MPL/JAK-STAT independent of JAK2) is field-standard knowledge but was not directly quoted from a retrieved source in this pass.
No literature tie between CALR and CD4+ T-cell-intrinsic biology was found — platform rationale rests on genetic association (OT score 0.72), not T-cell mechanism.
